name: algorand
description: Algorand blockchain integration for Codex — 122 MCP tools (wallet, transactions, smart contracts, DEX swaps, NFDs, prediction markets) plus expert skills for AlgoKit, Algorand TypeScript/Python, and x402 HTTP-native payments.

interface.shortDescription: Algorand blockchain tools and skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Full Algorand stack for Codex: the Algorand MCP server (wallet management, payments, asset and application transactions, atomic groups, TEAL, indexer/NFD/Tinyman/Haystack/Alpha Arcade APIs, x402 paid HTTP) plus deep skills for AlgoKit project workflows, Algorand TypeScript (PuyaTs) and Algorand Python (PuyaPy) smart-contract development, on-chain interaction, and x402 payment integration.
defaultPrompt: Create an AlgoKit project for a TypeScript contract.
Fetch this x402-protected API and pay for it.
